scripts.start: concurrently -n CLEAN,NORM,TOKEN,TXT,PDF,GATE -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white "node filters/cleaning-filter/server.js" "node filters/normalization-filter/server.js" "node filters/tokenization-filter/server.js" "node filters/search-txt-filter/server.js" "node filters/search-pdf-filter/server.js" "node gateway/server.js"
